item.title: sci-fi shenanigans & epic geekery (part 246)
item.description:
cosplay by mynessielife: https://www.instagram.com/mynessielife/
The longer you look the worse it gets.
item.dc:creator: lydecker17

item.title: 16 years sober this year !
item.description: Steve-O is known for his distinctive gravelly voice, which he initially attributed to his drug use and various stunts he's done over the years. After visiting a specialist, however, he was surprised to learn that it is simply because of his habit of using his throat muscles to talk, rather than his vocal cords.
item.dc:creator: JustaRandomCanadianFemale

item.title: Selfies taken at the Oscars by Ke Huy Quan
item.dc:creator: Pasquinel

item.title: 5 years after the Nerf prosthesis, it was time to unlock gaming for everyone
item.description: I'm seeking testers for my software, playAbility! It's available for free; all you need are Windows and a webcam to begin playing. Feedback is welcome, and please share with anyone concerned (added link: https://www.playability.gg/)
item.dc:creator: valentinsquirelo

item.title: Post
item.dc:creator: ilovedogknots

item.title: Wholesome Wednesday dump (mostly the Oscars and stuff)
item.description:
1. Charlize Theron excited to do tequila shots
2. Emma Stone finds out that Poor Things won the Oscar for Makeup & Hairstyling
3. They are evolving!
4. Goal: Actress Goal: Acchieved
5. Awww
6. Yet another film makers influenced by O.G. Star Wars
7
8
9. Ke Huy Quan's Oscar selfies
10. My opinion - you decide whether it's popular or not, but probably he should have returned in Indiana Jones instead of Mutt Williams and also Ryan Gosling should be there in too. Watch Blade Runner press conferences. Harrison and Ryan have amazing chemistry and of course Ke is great too. That would have been my ideal cast for a post-Crusaders Indiana Jones sequel. Also I don't care what anyone says Crusaders is the best Indiana Jones film of all time. It has it all - heart, action, nazi punching, Sean Connery, Salah, tank battle and John Williams score.
11
12. They made my day
13. Constructions workers make sure that this little library is still accessible
14
15. Don't forget! P.S. 1 Thanks for scrolling all the way trough! Hope this dump made you happy! Finally I would like to share with you a little passion project of mine. Me and my brother are making a game that is inspired by "The Stanley Parable" and the narrator definitely has a touch a of GladOS to him. It would make my day if you wishlisted: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. 2 HAVE A GREAT WEEK!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: 460lbs to 300 3ish years
item.description: Honestly wondering if I should do a yt series or something to share my story. No I don’t take peds and yes I have hypergonadism so in theory I have higher test then the average person, its 1100(ng/dl). I know this is slightly above average but it does make a difference. This is also for a Reddit post but just wanted to be transparent and needed to create a link. Thanks!
item.dc:creator: michaelspitler77

item.title: It's time for the ST: TNG Episode 'The High Ground' to come true!
item.description: While distracted by the French invasion, Ireland could pull a sneaky and reunify. It would certainly be a nice distraction from the day's events....
item.dc:creator: nonickname23

item.title: Boeing whistleblower found dead by "suicide"
item.description: "Knowles and another of Barnett's lawyers, Robert Turkewitz, told CBS News that "[Barnett] was in very good spirits and really looking forward to putting this phase of his life behind him and moving on. We didn't see any indication he would take his own life. No one can believe it." They called for a police investigation into his death."
item.dc:creator: AtomicJoe

item.title: Drooping his tongue made it more convincing

item.title: SHUT UP AND GET MY MONEY!

item.dc:creator: Skullwriter

item.title: Images of Note: Hewwo?
item.description:
This is how I feel when I wake up in the morning
Finally I'm free
o7
"Do you complain when you open a book and there's words inside?"
:)
I have had interactions like that, people can be so incredibly stupid.
poyo
apparently those little guys like being yeeted.
On this note: I am streaming Stardew every evening UK time at http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii.
Just by posting this meme, I am considered an extremist by the UK government.
:D
To be fair, screaming is therapeutic.
UwU
MANIC LAUGHTER INTENSIFIES
All of them.
:)
SANDWICH!
This, this is my cat when he sees another cat.
CONCERN
Same
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay Also I'm streaming currently: http://twitch.abbii.gay
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Just Funny X Things, Vol X (!!)
item.dc:creator: TwitterLitter

item.title: Wholesome post to brighten your day 786
item.description:
https://imgur.com/gallery/cDfCKos Wholesome Post 785 https://imgur.com/gallery/LqZIBMw Wholesome Post 784 https://imgur.com/gallery/nZIsd6L Wholesome Post 783 https://imgur.com/gallery/pry6GYw Wholesome Post 782 https://imgur.com/gallery/9wxlevH Wholesome Post 781 https://imgur.com/gallery/0Hhfc60 Wholesome Post 780 https://imgur.com/gallery/My95sho Wholesome Post 779
I include a Gofundme link in all of my posts to help raise money for people in need. I hope we can help https://www.gofundme.com/f/k4nfwb-please-help-me-escape
I made a wholesome support server on discord, whether you need support would like to give it or just want to chat with some lovely people and look at some wholesome things it's a nice place. Here's the link if you'd like to join us. https://discord.gg/8M983spH48
I hope this post brightened your day :) and i hope it is a lovely day for you! If you need to talk I am always available on discord (username HaveAGreatDay# 9735) and happy to listen. You matter, and if you are struggling please reach out for help. I made a wholesome support server on discord, whether you need support would like to give it or just want to chat with some lovely people and look at some wholesome things it's a nice place. Here's the link if you'd like to join us. https://discord.gg/8M983spH48 (originally posted by @ryanjoseph666 on 2023-03-14 17:32:38)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: Meme Dump 33 out of 200
item.description:
Happy Tuesday imgur ~ hope your week has been calm so far. Time for another 11k meme folder dumparoo
Every night lmaooo
ALL of the gifts
Why does it do this? :(
It's me, I'm that dinosaur ♡
Bet you Imgur is gonna "mature" me for this image Q_Q
Thanks for joining me on another meme dump. Remember to cry and poop on corporate time & stay hydrated always #memes #memedump #funny #gaming #mental_health #gamer #remembertostayhydrated
item.dc:creator: Orangefish

item.dc:creator: JKBenton

item.title: "They wanted me to save them from their hell..."
item.description:
"Me. A child."
"A young and lost child."
"The weight of the world was put on my shoulders."
"Forced to serve..."
"Forced to kill..."
"Forced to sacrifice."
"As time went on, I lost who I was..."
"Even now, I'm made to bloody these hands. With no end in sight." Comic Source: https://greyallison.tumblr.com/post/118146081458/annermation-this-is-my-submission-for
Quotes Source: (I recommend watching the other four Hero's Purpose videos first) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Bj9tAd6hZ-o
Quotes Source: (I recommend watching the other four Hero's Purpose videos first) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Bj9tAd6hZ-o
item.dc:creator: Onlyhereforthelaughs
